name: Scalloped Oysters
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Oysters, drained but liquid reserved
2/3 cup Liquid (half oyster liquid, Half milk or cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the ingredients, except croutons, in a shallow, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 12 minutes.
3. Sprinkle croutons on top of casserole and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven an additional 1 to 2 minutes or until heated through.
